message:
fix(sandbox,graphql): prevent IPv4-mapped IPv6 SSRF bypass and fix dedup lock race

Two security-relevant fixes:

1. Egress SSRF bypass prevention (egress.rs):
   Normalize IPv4-mapped IPv6 addresses (e.g., ::ffff:127.0.0.1) to
   pure IPv4 before checking CIDR allowlists in ip_in_any_cidr(). Without
   this, an attacker could bypass localhost/private-range CIDR blocks by
   using the IPv4-mapped IPv6 form of the address, since IpNet::contains()
   only matches within the same address family. Adds tests for
   is_localhost and is_private_range with mapped addresses.

2. GraphQL dedup lock race (client.rs):
   Fix a subtle TOCTOU race in the dedup cache: previously the lock was
   acquired as immutable, the key was looked up, the lock was dropped,
   and then re-acquired as mutable to insert — leaving a window where
   another task could insert the same key. Now acquires a mutable guard
   once and reuses it for both the lookup and insert, eliminating the
   race window.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
